ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product (e.g., MI/VIC-46664) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the unit price (e.g., USD) */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_no" INTEGER /* Account number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the account */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the account */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the account */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the account */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the channel */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the invoice belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for payment */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the invoice */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total" REAL /* Total price of the product (quantity x unit price) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "returned_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity returned for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_no FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_no") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for the payment */,
  "paid_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_paid_by FOREIGN KEY ("paid_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_no FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_no") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
